summary: Data-driven economist with 8+ years of experience in remittance flow analysis, diaspora investment trends, and geospatial visualization. Expertise in policy advisory, economic modeling, and data storytelling. Published research on Kenya’s diaspora remittance corridors. Passionate about leveraging open data and GitHub-backed CMS (Mavo) for transparent analytics.

workExperiences.description:
Digitized 50+ historical maps; built interactive web maps with Python.

Managed spatial databases in PostgreSQL; improved query efficiency by ~30%.

Analyzed satellite imagery for a land cover pilot project.

educations.eduDescription: Distinction. Coursework: Econometrics, GIS, Development Finance.

educations.degree: Bachelor of Science Geospatial Informatio Science(with IT)
educations.institution: University of Nairobi, Upper Second Class
educations.eduDescription: Minor in Statistics; President of Economics Students' Association.

projects.projectDescription: Interactive geospatial platform visualizing real-time remittance flows from 6 global regions to Kenya. Built with Leaflet, Turf.js, and Mavo CMS.
Open-source, Mavo-powered resume template with GitHub bagjjfjfbcbckend, PDF export, and schema.org markup for ATS compatibility.
Time-series analysis and machine learning model to predict diaspora remittance inflows using macroeconomic indicators.
